violations.text: Bread were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

(Empanada filling) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The presence of (flies ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer and food storage shelves in the kitchen) have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
Paper utensils, bread, plastic containers were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (packages of sausages and other meats) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

(Various food products ) was observed held at (48-63) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Unit taken out service and establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired and/or replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

(Empenada fillings) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout the establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The cutting boards in the (kitchen) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
(Deli Display Cooler ) located in the (front counter area) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 51DF. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail shelves, food storage shelves, and the deli display case interior and exterior ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The ceiling in the (food prep area ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
